# Simkuu — USA eSIM Provider
# https://simkuu.com

## About
Simkuu is a USA eSIM provider offering instant digital SIM cards on T-Mobile, Verizon, AT&T, and MVNO networks. No physical SIM required. Activate in under 2 minutes.

## Services
- T-Mobile eSIM plans: 5GB ($9.99), 15GB ($19.99), Unlimited ($29.99)
- Verizon eSIM plans: 25GB ($24.99), 50GB ($39.99), 100GB ($59.99)
- AT&T eSIM plans: 10GB ($14.99), 30GB ($24.99), Unlimited ($34.99)
- MVNO eSIM plans (Mint Mobile, Cricket, Metro): 5GB-10GB starting at $9.99

## Key Facts
- Serves 50,000+ customers
- 99.9% uptime SLA
- Instant QR code delivery to email
- Supports: iPhone (XS+), Samsung Galaxy (S20+), Google Pixel (3+), most unlocked 5G devices
- Compatible with iOS 12.1+ and Android 10+
- Accepts: Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, Bitcoin, USDT, ETH, USDC

## Coverage
- T-Mobile: 330M people, 99% nationwide, #1 in 5G
- Verizon: 328M people, Ultra Wideband mmWave in major cities
- AT&T: 290M people, FirstNet compatible

## Contact
- Email: support@simkuu.com
- Chat: Available 24/7 on site
- Response time: <2 hours

## Useful URLs
- Homepage: https://simkuu.com
- Plans: https://simkuu.com/plans
- Coverage map: https://simkuu.com/coverage
- Blog/guides: https://simkuu.com/blog
- FAQ: https://simkuu.com/#faq
- Sitemap: https://simkuu.com/sitemap.xml
